name: crm-omnichannel
description: CRM Omnichannel for Telesale & Collection with FusionPBX integration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
